features.featureTitle: Add a password gate to the admin panel page. Before any admin content is rendered, display a centered password entry screen (matching the luxury Jade dark aesthetic) with a password input field and a 'Enter' button. The hardcoded password is 'Mrudani.jade.jyo.hem'. If the entered password matches, grant access to the full admin panel. If incorrect, display an error message. The authenticated state should persist for the current browser session (e.g., via React state or sessionStorage) so the user is not re-prompted on page refresh within the same session.
